reviews.comment: I recently had my car windows tinted by FWT, and I couldn't be happier with the results! From start to finish, the service was exceptional. The staff at FWT was friendly and knowledgeable, helping me choose the perfect tint for my needs. The installation was flawless, and my car looks sleek and stylish with the new tint. The quality of their work is top-notch, and I appreciate their attention to detail. I highly recommend FWT for anyone looking to tint their windows. Five stars all the way!

reviewReply.comment: We couldn't be happier with the review - thank you!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaZ0lUVHVnRRAB

reviews.comment: Very unsatisfied with a tint installation that was performed on my BMW M4. When I sent along pictures, at their request I was informed that could be considered normal, but they invited me to bring the car back. Their response did not inspire confidence, so I just took my losses. There were bubbles in every window. I've used much cheaper installers with better results. Maybe I'm more particular than the average consumer, but I have since explored other options with much better results.

reviewReply.comment: Hi Nick! The initial tint job was done three years ago back in 2020. You brought issues to our concern and we set up a day for you to bring it back for us to look over - to which you no called / no showed. We wish we had an opportunity to make it right for you but we're glad you found another shop that better met your needs. We wish you only the best in the future. -FWT

reviews.comment:
I have had numerous vehicles tinted here at FWT and always return for a reason. Great service and a perfect job everytime. Always greeted with a smile (even when I don't have an appointment) Their concern for customers is unmatched. My most recent vehicle had a temp tag still and before they even started the tech made it a point to come out and be sure we had already done a MD inspection beforehand! Where else would you get that?
Thanks guys! See you on the next one!
